title: monday.com Form embedded in an email
excerpt: Can we embed a monday.com form directly in the body of an email so that it’s displayed within the email itself?

posts.author: AnastasiyaLoboda (Anastasiya)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we embed a monday.com form directly in the body of an email so that it’s displayed within the email itself?

posts.author: GRoss (Greg)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team was just wondering this, as well. That would be a fantastic feature.

posts.author: danmedalle (Dan Jezreel Medalle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Anastasia, I haven’t tried embedding the form on the body of the email yet. What you can do is incorporate the link to the form within the email.

All the best,
Dan | Mindflows
